eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Granite, MT; at 11:44 AM on JUL 1, 2026 Effective until 10:44 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Flood watch - Flash flooding caused by excessive rainfall is possible. Slow moving thunderstorm producing heavy rain. Monitor later forecast and be prepared to take action should Flash Flood Warnings be issued.
